--- Round 1 --- The question asks me to list '税金及附加' (taxes and surcharges) for each company in increasing order. I need to find this financial metric in the document. Looking at the document structure, the most likely place to find '税金及附加' would be in the financial statements, specifically in the income statement (利润表). Section [5.1.2] 合并利润表 (Consolidated Income Statement) is the most relevant section to open.
